verses.text: Upon 'the first day of the week' let each lay by in store 'as God hath prospered him.' Planned giving. Regular, proportioned giving is the rule.
Upon 'the first day of the week' let each lay by in store 'as God hath prospered him.' Planned giving. Regular, proportioned giving is the rule.
He will send their gift to Jerusalem 'by... approved' men. Honest care. The offering is handled with integrity.
He will send their gift to Jerusalem 'by... approved' men. Honest care. The offering is handled with integrity.
I will come after Macedonia, 'if the Lord permit.' Submissive plans. He orders his way under God's will.
I will come after Macedonia, 'if the Lord permit.' Submissive plans. He orders his way under God's will.
I will come after Macedonia, 'if the Lord permit.' Submissive plans. He orders his way under God's will.
I tarry at Ephesus, for 'a great door and effectual is opened,' and many adversaries. Open door. Opportunity and opposition come together.
I tarry at Ephesus, for 'a great door and effectual is opened,' and many adversaries. Open door. Opportunity and opposition come together.
Receive Timothy; I greatly desired Apollos to come. Caring counsel. He thinks of the welfare and welcome of his fellow-workers.
Receive Timothy; I greatly desired Apollos to come. Caring counsel. He thinks of the welfare and welcome of his fellow-workers.
Receive Timothy; I greatly desired Apollos to come. Caring counsel. He thinks of the welfare and welcome of his fellow-workers.
'Watch ye, stand fast in the faith, quit you like men, be strong'; let all be done with charity. Brave and loving. Firmness and love together mark the Christian.
'Watch ye, stand fast in the faith, quit you like men, be strong'; let all be done with charity. Brave and loving. Firmness and love together mark the Christian.
The house of Stephanas 'addicted themselves to the ministry'; acknowledge such. Honour service. The diligent labourers deserve recognition.
The house of Stephanas 'addicted themselves to the ministry'; acknowledge such. Honour service. The diligent labourers deserve recognition.
The house of Stephanas 'addicted themselves to the ministry'; acknowledge such. Honour service. The diligent labourers deserve recognition.
The house of Stephanas 'addicted themselves to the ministry'; acknowledge such. Honour service. The diligent labourers deserve recognition.
The churches salute you; 'greet one another with an holy kiss.' Warm fellowship. The churches are bound in love.
The churches salute you; 'greet one another with an holy kiss.' Warm fellowship. The churches are bound in love.
If any love not the Lord, 'let him be Anathema'; 'the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.' Closing blessing. He ends with a warning and a benediction.
If any love not the Lord, 'let him be Anathema'; 'the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.' Closing blessing. He ends with a warning and a benediction.
